title: Lavender Commencement Celebration
description: The annual celebration recognizes the excellence, achievements, and contributions of CCA's Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, Transsexual, Queer, Questioning, Intersex, Pansexual, Two-Spirited, and/or Asexual/Aromantic graduating students and their artistic achievements while recognizing their time at the college. This event is hosted by the Office of Student Belonging & Inclusion.
